rationale: Xi's Pyongyang visit and continued Middle East strikes are background noise; no direct Black Sea or Moldova escalation reported this cycle.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping visits Pyongyang to revitalise China-North Korea ties
top_events.summary: Strengthened China-North Korea axis could complicate NATO's eastern posture, indirectly relevant to Romania's security calculus.

top_events.title: El Niño under way, threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: Active El Niño raises risk of extreme weather in Europe including the Black Sea region, with potential agricultural and energy implications for Romania.

top_events.title: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 17
top_events.summary: Ongoing Middle East conflict; indirect effect on EU energy prices and regional stability relevant to Romania.
